testcase.name: Created pet appears in sold list after status update - Example #1.1
testcase.system-out: Given the base URL is configured............................................passed Given I create a pet with name "HighValueBulldog" category "HighValueBulldog" and status "available".passed Then the response status code should be 200.................................passed And I extract the pet ID from the response..................................passed When I send a PUT request to update the pet status to "sold"................passed When I send a GET request to fetch the store inventory......................passed When I send a GET request to find pets by status "sold".....................passed And the created pet ID should be present in the "sold" pets list............passed

testcase.name: Verify available pet count matches between inventory and findByStatus
testcase.system-out: Given the base URL is configured............................................passed When I send a GET request to fetch the store inventory......................passed Then the response status code should be 200.................................passed And I extract the available count from inventory............................passed When I send a GET request to find pets by status "available"................passed And the count of pets returned should match the inventory available count...passed

testcase.name: Create, retrieve, update and delete a pet - Example #1.1
testcase.system-out: Given the base URL is configured............................................passed Given I have a pet with name "BuddyTest" and status "available".............passed When I send a POST request to create the pet................................passed Then the response status code should be 200.................................passed And I extract the pet ID from the response..................................passed When I send a GET request to retrieve the pet by ID.........................passed And the pet name should be "BuddyTest"......................................passed And the pet status should be "available"....................................passed When I send a PUT request to update the pet status to "sold"................passed When I send a DELETE request to delete the pet..............................passed And the deleted pet should not be retrievable...............................passed

testcase.name: Create, retrieve, update and delete a pet - Example #1.2
testcase.system-out: Given the base URL is configured............................................passed Given I have a pet with name "MaxTest" and status "pending".................passed When I send a POST request to create the pet................................passed Then the response status code should be 200.................................passed And I extract the pet ID from the response..................................passed When I send a GET request to retrieve the pet by ID.........................passed And the pet name should be "MaxTest"........................................passed And the pet status should be "pending"......................................passed When I send a PUT request to update the pet status to "sold"................passed When I send a DELETE request to delete the pet..............................passed And the deleted pet should not be retrievable...............................passed

testcase.classname: TC3 - User Security and Error Handling (Negative Testing)
testcase.name: Create a user with an invalid email format - Example #1.1
testcase.system-out: Given the base URL is configured............................................passed When I send a POST request to create a user with username "testUser001" email "invalid_email" and password "pass123".passed Then the create user response status code should be 200.....................passed

testcase.classname: TC3 - User Security and Error Handling (Negative Testing)
testcase.name: Fetch a user that does not exist - Example #1.1
testcase.system-out: Given the base URL is configured............................................passed When I send a GET request to fetch user "nonExistentUser12345"..............passed Then the response status code should be 404.................................passed And the response message should contain "User not found"....................passed

testcase.classname: TC3 - User Security and Error Handling (Negative Testing)
testcase.name: Login with incorrect credentials - Example #1.1
testcase.system-out: Given the base URL is configured............................................passed When I send a GET request to login with username "wrongUser" and password "wrongPassword".passed Then the response status code should be 200.................................passed And the response should not contain a valid session token...................passed
